extract: Eterna Forest (Japanese: ハクタイの森 Hakutai Forest) is a forest located in western Sinnoh. It lies on Route 205, separating the two portions of the route, which leads to Floaroma Town in the south and Eterna City in the east. The forest is also the location of the Old Chateau, which can be found in the very northeast. Eterna Forest is enveloped in chilly air. Thick stands of trees turn the forest into a natural maze. The forest is home to many Bug- and Grass-type Pokémon, and it is one of only two places in Sinnoh where wild Murkrow/Misdreavus can be found, the other being the Lost Tower. A Moss Rock, which allows Eevee to evolve into Leafeon, can be found in the west of the forest.
